title: Section 116I
content: 1[116I. Validity of base unit area values of vacant land and covered space of building.---The base unit area value of vacant land and the base unit area value of covered space of building in respect of a specified group in a ward shall remain in force for a period of three years: Provided that till the revision of such base unit area values is completed, the existing base unit area values shall continue to be in force.
footnote: 1. Ins. by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, s. 8 (w.e.f. 1-8-2003).
